message:
fix: center action buttons and deduplicate tiles by tmux session (#73)

- Center tile/attach/add buttons in tab bar using flex spacers
- Deduplicate tile grid by tmux session: if multiple checked tabs
  share the same tmux session, only one tile is rendered to prevent
  synchronized scrolling (tmux session groups share panes)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
